legacy JWT re-signing when no refresh token exists.

* feat: normalize all 12 voice dimensions to 0-100 scale (#46)

Previously, the 4 core dimensions (humor, formality, brevity, contrarianTone)
used 0-100 while the 8 extended dimensions used 0-10. This mismatch caused
the frontend (which uses 0-100 for all) to send values that failed backend
validation.

Changes:
- Prisma schema: Float→Int, default 5.0→50 for 8 extended dimensions
- Zod validation: max(10)→max(100) for 8 extended dimensions
- Prompt builder: toTenPointScale() converts 0-100 stored values to 0-10
  for natural language descriptions (describe functions unchanged)
- Calibration: AI still returns 0-10, tenToHundred() converts for storage

Co-authored-by: Alex Peri <aitkenassociates@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: background draft scheduler — auto-posts scheduled drafts every 60s

Polls for SCHEDULED drafts with scheduledAt <= now, posts to X via OAuth,
handles token refresh, moves to APPROVED if no X token linked. Processes
max 10 per cycle. Runs inside main API process (no separate worker).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use grok-3-latest model for trending scan

* fix: onboardingTrack enum binary format error in registration

Prisma was encoding `undefined` as the OnboardingTrack enum type,
causing PostgreSQL error "incorrect binary data format in bind parameter 7".
Changed to conditional spread so the field is omitted entirely when not provided.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
[gpu] Fix contour breaks and bounds quantization in encode (#5892)

Encode used adjacent endpoint equality to infer contour breaks, which
fails when two contours touch at the same point. Track contour starts
explicitly during accumulation instead, and use that flag when packing
shared endpoints.

Encode also rounded blob bounds to the nearest quarter unit. That can
shrink the encoded extents and clip coverage at glyph edges. Quantize
mins downward and maxes upward so the blob header always encloses the
actual geometry.

Add focused API tests for both regressions.

Testing:
- meson test -C build

commit.message:
fix(server): move Better Auth rate limiting into the database (#27)

* fix(auth): move rate limiting into the database

Summary:
- switch Better Auth rate limiting to native database storage
- add the canonical Better Auth rate_limit table and migration
- simplify the launch contract to model only API rate-limit storage
- remove Bun's auth-specific filesystem rate-limit adapter and make API
  limiter storage an explicit shell dependency

Rationale:
- Better Auth keys are opaque identifiers and should not be projected into
  filesystem paths
- auth throttling belongs to the auth system, while Bun should only choose
  the runtime backend for the general API limiter
- keeping runtime config purely descriptive reduces hidden shell state and
  removes redundant configuration

## 背景

- 解决 issue #2 里提到的 nested runtime 区域视觉对比不足问题。
- 重点不是继续给单个语言堆特判，而是把 block 型 nested region 做成统一的 renderer 能力。

## 改动

- 重做 nested region 渲染链路，引入基于 region segment 的按行合成模型，替换旧的 background fill
拼接方式。
- 把区域层级改成累计的 `visual level`，支持 parent / child 逐层递进的 tint，而不是固定枚举档位。
- 为 Rustdoc markdown 补充 `line-start` 几何锚点，让文档注释区域的 block 边界更整齐。
- 保留现有 token 级 Dracula 语义配色，在其下方叠加更平滑的 region-level tint。

- `cargo test --quiet`

- `terminal-colorsaurus` 仍然只是当前阶段的 OSC 11
查询后端；相关中文注释已保留，后续可以迁移到我们自己维护、支持颜色查询的 terminal API 层。
- 这次 PR 最终只保留真实渲染能力，没有保留临时 demo 代码。

Closes #2

commit.message:
将 SQL 与 zsh 切换到 crate-backed Tree-sitter parser 以降低冷构建耗时 (#4)

## 背景

这次主要目标不是继续微调 SQL grammar 本身，而是尽量降低 cold build 时 Tree-sitter parser
生成带来的关键路径耗时。

前面的构建 profile 已经确认，冷构建里最重的两项是 SQL 和 zsh 的 parser 生成。相比继续在 grammar
规则层面做个位数优化，这次改动改成直接使用上游 Rust grammar crate 提供的预生成 parser，避免在 `kat` 自己的
`build.rs` 里重复生成 `parser.c`。

## 变更

- 将 SQL parser 切换为 `tree-sitter-sequel` crate backend
- 将 zsh parser 切换为 `tree-sitter-zsh` crate backend
- 在 `grammars/registry.toml` 中增加 `parser_source = "crate"`，让 parser 来源成为
registry 级约定，而不是 `build.rs` 里的语言特判
- 让 `build.rs` 对 crate-backed grammar 跳过本地 `tree-sitter-generate` /
native parser build
- 删除仓库里已经失效的本地 SQL / zsh parser 源文件，仅保留本地 queries 和集成逻辑
- 更新第三方归属与架构/维护文档，明确 SQL / zsh 现在是 crate-backed grammar

## 验证

- `cargo build --release --locked`
- `just test`
- 使用全新 `CARGO_TARGET_DIR` 做 release build，确认 SQL / zsh 已不再依赖仓库内本地 parser
文件
- build profile 中确认：
  - `grammar=sql source=crate skip-local-build`
  - `grammar=zsh source=crate skip-local-build`

## 说明

- 这次没有移除现有 SQL 方言 runtime，也没有移除本地 SQL / zsh queries
- `sql_postgres` / `sql_mysql` / `sql_sqlite` 仍然保留，现有 semantic overlay
与宿主注入逻辑也继续沿用
- 这次调整改变的是“底层 parser 来源”，不是上层方言分发模型

---------

commit.message:
feat(runtime): expand nested runtime highlighting and CI coverage (#1)

## Why
- 现有 YAML / GitHub Actions 场景已经需要超出“按扩展名选 grammar”的能力，继续堆特判会让后续维护越来越脆。
- `proto` 和 `textproto` 虽然同属 protobuf 生态，但分别承载 schema 和文本数据，长期看应拆成独立
runtime。
- 现有 nested runtime 语义增强原本分散在少数语言路径里，需要抽到统一 semantic overlay 层，才能继续扩
GitHub Actions、shell、regex、SQL 和 JSDoc 这类场景。
- 需要先在 CI 里验证多目标构建是否稳定可用，并积累更可读的构建耗时与缓存基线。

## What
- 重构 runtime 检测与分发模型，引入 `document kind`、YAML profile、host resolver
和统一语言别名归一化。
- 为 GitHub Actions workflow / `action.yml` 增加场景化高亮，支持 `run` 按
`shell`、`defaults.run.shell` 和 template shell 分发，并补齐 `${{ ... }}`
expression、`if`、`uses`、`permissions`、`runs-on`、`shell` 等 profile-aware
overlay。
- 新增 `proto` / `textproto` runtime，以及 `powershell` / `batch` grammar 与
overlay；GitHub Actions 和 Justfile 里的 `pwsh` / `cmd` 现在也会进入对应 runtime。
- 抽象并推广通用 semantic overlay，覆盖 shell / regex / SQL / JSDoc，并为 PowerShell
/ Batch 增加轻量语义增强。
- 新增 fixture / showcase / 回归测试，并同步更新语言覆盖、架构说明和第三方归属文档。
- 重构构建矩阵 CI：vendor 仓库内 `sccache` action、补充 build timing observability、缓存
tree-sitter build outputs，并收敛 pnpm / Node 安装流程。

## Testing
- `cargo fmt --all`
- `just test`

---------

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>
